text.title: Ops Dashboard Setup Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable inputs to a rule from `01-core-rules.xml`. MANDATORY for every methodology — even flat ones — per F-066 DoD.

decision-tree.root-question: Metrics in ≥3 tools AND review cadence exists AND ≤7 KPIs committed?

branch.when: data_sources_count >= 3 AND review_cadence_exists == true AND kpi_count <= 7
